How can I create reason code ON DM because when I am trying to implement OEE perform on LM PD in our DM system ,I cant see any reason code. Please suggest me how I am create the Reason code to test LM POD for OEE performance check for Discrete industry.

Also I can't see the latest UI on LM POD. Please suggest me which configuration I should  add.

 

Thanks,

Sunita Sarkar

entry.title: Is anyone else having issues connecting with Plateau Report Designer after the recent release?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am experiencing a certificate error when trying to connect Plateau Report Designer to our test environment. It was working previously. I can't find a missing/expired certificate on my laptop that would directly point to the problem. (Yes, I saw the KBA that speaks directly to this issue and the one the hints to a release related issue but is strangely unavailable(?))

Has anyone else experienced issues recently? Alternatively, do you know exactly which certificate is needed here? The available KBA's don't explicitly state what certificates are relevant only to go to my IT group. They didn't respond well to my vague query so I thought I would inquire here. They have reviewed my laptop and can't see anything has expired in the last two months.

entry.title: Re: SAP SSO successor
entry.content:
Hello, the successor to SAP Single Sign-On 3.0 is SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI.

For more details, check out these blogs:

SAP GUI MFA with SAP Secure Login Service and Microsoft Entra ID]

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-gui-mfa-with-sap-secure-login-service-and-microsoft-entra-id/ba-p/13605383

Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/exploring-sap-secure-login-service-for-sap-gui-a-comprehensive-review/ba-p/13573382

This service is part / comes with the SAP Cloud Identity Services and aims to cover all common use cases for BTP, SaaS, and traditional on-premises or private cloud ABAP and S/4HANA systems using SAP Logon. It can already replace SAP SSO 3.0, though some features from the old SAP Secure Login Server are not yet implemented. However, most scenarios, such as SNC with Kerberos and X.509, are supported.

We recommend all new (greenfield) customers implement this new solution. Existing customers should consider migrating to centralize authentication towards an identity provider, enhancing security through identity and device signals, and adopting zero-trust approaches.

Hope this helps.

Cheers Colt

entry.title: Re: How to Create Return order with reference to Billing doc using FM: SD_ADV_RETURNS_CREATE
entry.content: Are you trying this on S/4HANA Public cloud or S/4HANA OP/Private?

entry.title: MM Schedule line moveing to end of planning time end date after running MRP with MD02
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have an issue regarding planning time fence.

Schedule lines between previous planning fence end date and new planning fence end date are moving to end of new planning time fence date.

Example- 

Previous planning time fence end date 26.05.2024

Schedule is there on 28.05.2024

After running MRP with MD02 on S4 HANA (version 1909) new planning time fence date is 30.05.2024 which is correct as per days maintained in material master.but schedule line which is on 28.05.2024 is moved to 30.05.2024.

Actually it should move to in planning time fence but it not.

I have tried with MD01N and it is working correctly as expected.

MRP type- P1 

Lot Size- EX 

Please help here with your solutions

Thanks in Advance.

Current components levels in our system are as shown in screen shot below

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing
entry.content:
Hi Brinda911,

Firstly are you using CPI or MDI for master data replication? We suggest you choose only one tool for data integration. Refer setup details in chapter 7 and 8 in 57z Setup. If you are not sure which tool used in current integration process, please check which communication system used in communication arrangement. 

And as shpresimeshabaj mentioned. For product master data, we only support products replication from subscription billing to S4/HC. After setting up ready, creating or updating products in subscription billing will trigger those products replicate to S4/HC. 

Regarding business partner replication. You can ignore the error "Replicationships not replicated" . According to the success message "message xxxxx with 3 data records was transferred to PI", the BP replication should work. You can check in subscription billing if the BP already there. You can monitor success/error messages in S4 app "Monitor Message Overview", note the message namespace interfaces are " /CMDBP - BP_OUT" and "/CMDBP - BPCONF_IN". (If no message shows , you need to assign the recipients to your S4/HC user, refer to detail in Assigning recipients to users | SAP Help Portal).

Both for Product and BP replication, You can monitor success or error message in S4/HC as mentioned, and you also could monitor in CPI or CALM (Depends on which tool you used). Refer to Integration Monitoring | SAP Help Portal and Monitoring Master Data Replication in SAP Cloud ALM | SAP Help Portal

BR,

Yoyo

entry.title: Force cross app navigation in fiori launchpad in the same tab
entry.content:
When we are clicking on new app tile it's opening in same tab in fiori launchpad but once we are clicking any hyperlink of the app it's opening in a new separate tab. I have attached some screenshot so that anyone can understand. User is asking not to open any different tab of cross app (standard) app. Actually we have already configured fiori launchpad configuration like attached screenshot as well.

As it's opening in new separate tab so when user is clicking back button he/she landing in home page of fiori launchpad screen and user is not getting what he/she has done so far.

Is it the expected behavior or we are missing any configuration from our side. Please give some suggestions, thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: EWM - Delete Handling Unit when adding to existing Ha...
entry.content:
Hi ewmguy11,

Thanks for your answer!

Yes, we have the same setting in the process type, and also I discovered some day ago that it was possible from the RF.  But it's not possible from the monitor or via the Fiori APP.
I find it a little bit strange that you have customizing tables in order to control how the system reacts, but then there it's different coding for different user interfaces that behaves in different ways, which makes it confusing and time consuming when testing different settings. But now it's working anyway.

SAP sometimes works in mysterious ways;)

entry.title: Re: EHS WWI coding
entry.content:
Hello Holger,

in linne 4 you open a BIF with number 001 which is still open when you open, in line 8, a BRG also with number 001. That doesn't work, numbering needs to be unique. The same is true for BIF000 (line 3) and BNG000 (line 11).

The second error is because you started a G-repeating group within a discrete repeating group (BRG001 within BRG088). I don't think that is allowed.

 

Best regards,


Ralph

entry.title: Re: Changing Purchase Order Qy on ByDesigen
entry.content: The actual machine confirmed that the quantity of PurchaseOrder could be reduced. (1, Register 100 units as scheduled for delivery in PurchaseOrder, 2, Register 100 units as scheduled for delivery in Inbound Delivery Notification, 3, Register 5 units in Inbound Delivery, 4, Edit the quantity in Purchase Order and change it to 5 units). However, three problems cannot be solved. 1, After doing 1 to 4 above, the Status of the Purchase Order remains ‘Follow-up document created’. 2, After doing 1 to 4 above, the Inbound Delivery Notification quantity remains at 100 and cannot be changed. 3, This may be unnecessary, but I cannot press the ‘Finish’ button of Purchase Order. No. 1 is particularly troublesome. Because the To-be is that the Status of the PurchaseOrder is ‘Finished’.

entry.title: Re: Check the changes in the inventory in chronological o...
entry.content:
Dear Taty,

Yes, you can use report Confirmation Journal .

For your further question, I believe you can create a calculated Key Figure in this report. For more information, please view below help portal 

Create and Edit a Key Figure | SAP Help Portal

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA - ODATA API's - is it time for a "Safety Belt" ?
entry.content:
agreed,

. there is no performance problem in the S/4HANA

. this is a Consumer/Client problem

. should implement Top and Skip to reduce the result set

the problem is though, that

if the Consumer/Client behaves in an inconsiderate way

and embraces and enjoys the freedom and power that the API gives them

then the worst case result could be that an amount of workload comes on to the S/4HANA which the S/4HANA was not sized or prepared for

and then it becomes our problem

hence, apart from publishing Guidelines on dos and don'ts for ODATA API's which could be missed or ignored, the question is, could we put in physical controls on the use of the API and restrictions on the amount of workload that it can put on the S/4, something like the Safety Belt which we had for Bi Java back in the day

entry.title: Re: EHS WWI coding
entry.content:
Hello @ral 

thanks,

It seems that 11BRG001 type G dosn't allowed on that position.

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content:
Hi,

there are several functions to retrieve various runtime parameters. Have a look at the reference guide:

DS Reference Guide 

You can browse the catalogue there. Specifically look at current_configuration(), current_system_configuration() or datastore_field_value().

Further descriptions of all available functions are also available here.

That might already be what you are looking for.

BR,

Julian

entry.title: Equipment Card is not showing all the operations
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

When creating an equipment card, I noticed not all operations are being shown. 

In the outgoing goods, there should be two operations and its only showing one of them. 

There are no filters. Does anyone know why this is happening?

Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: Error is: No component exists with the name "FOR".
entry.content:
Hi, according to the documentation you can't use FOR with VALUE if your type is a structure. This is only possible if your type is an internal table. 

VALUE - Structures
Syntax
... VALUE dtype|#( [let_exp]
                   [BASE dobj]
                   comp1 = dobj1 comp2 = dobj2 ... ) ...

VALUE - Internal Tables
Syntax
... VALUE dtype|#( [let_exp]
                   [BASE itab]
                   [FOR for_exp1
                    FOR for_exp2
                    ... ]
                   ( line_spec1 )
                   ( line_spec2 )
                     ... ) ...

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the...
entry.content:
Is it normal delivery or STO/Intercompany? Please check the details of assignment like below -

Ordering Plant - Company code

Receiving Plant - Company code

TPP - Company code

Shipping point - Plant

Delivering plant assignment to Sales Org and Distribution channel

If STO, then Assign Shipping data for plants

entry.title: Re: EHS WWI coding
entry.content:
Hi Holger,

You need to put the G - repeating group on the outside of all other repeating groups and if statements.

 

Best Regards

Mark

entry.title: Re: how do i change a login email
entry.content:
Hi @preemo - if you need to change the log in email you use for Universal ID, you can do so yourself at account.sap.com. You can choose your log in email under the Personal Info -> Personal Data -> Universal ID E-mail settings. 

If you want to change the email address at accounts.sap.com for a P-user ID, you need to contact the SAP ID Service team by sending an email to sso@sap.com. If you have a S-user ID, your company's S-user ID administrator can change that email address for you.

entry.title: Re: hana db with vector in CAP Application
entry.content:
You may need to upgrade your HANA Cloud instance if you are not in QRC 1/2024 release. A part from that, there is nothing to activate.
For using it from CAP application, I would advice the CAP LLM plug-in, see https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-and-machine-learning/revolutionizing-cap-applications-with-ai-introducing-the-sap-cap-llm-plugin/td-p/13688212

entry.title: Re: #CoE#JJTOOLS Synchronize delivery quantity with picki...
entry.content:
Hello.

The custom code implemented for synchronization might have conditions that are not properly handling the scenario when the delivery is being edited post-picking or shipment posting. Review the logic, especially any parts that react to status changes or updates made during outbound delivery processing. You are fully responsible for the customizing and developing you make on your system.  If the issue persists or requires deep technical intervention, please raise a support ticket with SAP.

Hope this can help.

Dave

Process Manager

 

Process Collaboration Hub

 

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP SSO successor
entry.content: There are also other very good products for SAP GUI SSO and MFA (e.g. Okta) and are available from third-party companies (SAP partners). My company is one of them, and we have a very exciting roadmap plan beyond 2027.

entry.title: Re: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Hi S Kumar,

MRS 10 has an end of life for SAP S/4HANA in 2027 and for SAP ECC in 2030, hence we are not actively positioning this solution for new customers. With that we have two successors, SAP S/4HANA Asset Management for resource scheduling (RSH), and SAP Field Service Management (FSM).  At a high level, the natural successor for MRS is SAP RSH for in plant maintenance operations and SAP FSM for field service related operations. Here is a blog I wrote on the topic which goes into much more detail. You can also find a demo video of RSH here, and FSM demo videos here. 

Hope this helps,

Thanks,
Ryan

entry.title: Re: ADSO fields getting empty post data activation
entry.content: Hello @aalbis. It would be interesting to see your key fields in the newly converted ADSO! I would say it is maybe the problem that you don't have enough key fields now and that some records with initial values overwrite others with characteristics available?!

entry.title: How to bind SAP UI5 Model response with the handler function
entry.content:
I have a function which create an entry in backend when an button ( save button ) is pressed.

Code for creating entry

var oModel = this.getModel('action');
oModel.create(path, body, {
  success: this._onSuccess.bind(this),   //How to pass response along with the bind function
  error: this._onError.bind(this)
});
_onSuccess: function (response) {
  // Response is not having any headers
  //Show some success message
},

Instead of directly calling the function, I have binded the _onSuccess function to oModel.create's success handler. From the backend I am sending some header parameters along the (POST) response, which I need to access inside the _onSuccess message and display. When I directly include the function in success handler, I am able to see the response, but not sure how send it along the bind parameter

This is working

callCreate: function (path, body) {
  var oModel = this.getModel('action');
  oModel.create(path, body, {
    success: function (data, response) {
        //I am able to get the response headers here
    },
    error: this._onError.bind(this)
  });
},

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: Custom Widget & Widget Add-Ons Samples Preview
entry.content:
Hey @JefB 

The Pareto Chart is now available as Custom Widget and you can download it from the GitHub. Please check the blog above, you will find the link to the resource files.

Thanks

Marouene

entry.title: Re: SAP SSO successor
entry.content: Absolutely Tim, sorry for not mentioning that 😉

entry.title: Re: Mass activate email notifications in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi,

It's currently not possible to activate the e-mail notifications for Implementation artifacts (Defects, etc.) for other users, even if you are an Admin. Users have to "opt-in" for the notifications, and can only do so after having been assigned at least once to the artifact (e.g. they need to be assigned to at least 1 Defect, then the option to enable Defect e-mails will become available). There is also no way to mass change this setting for multiple users (even as an Admin).

If you want to suggest these ideas as feature requests/improvements, please use the SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation SAP Customer Influence Campaign.

entry.title: Re: I am not able to calculate calculated rows variance
entry.content:
Hello @vaishanavibashyam,

without knowing all details of your model/story, I think the only solution can be found in be found in the model settings: Structure Priority.

Usually here you have to define, which formula wins, either the one in the rows, or the one in the column.

Hope it helps... since in the past (old model) variances of version was really difficult, if I remember right.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: How to bind SAP UI5 Model response with the handler f...
entry.content:
Hi, you just need to add an additional parameter to your _onSuccess function definition. Modify your _onSuccess function definition on line 6 to following:

var oModel = this.getModel('action');
oModel.create(path, body, {
  success: this._onSuccess.bind(this),   //How to pass response along with the bind function
  error: this._onError.bind(this)
});
_onSuccess: function (data, response) {
  // Response is not having any headers
  //Show some success message
},

entry.title: Re: BTP BAS checking javascript version
entry.content:
Hi, 

JavaScript version is not defined on BAS. The version of JavaScript used depends on the browser that the client uses to access your Ui5 app.

entry.title: Can we remove duplicate records at the runtime in dataflow?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is it possible to remove the duplicate records at runtime when dataflow is executing on list of records.

e.g. An excel file of 10 records out of which 5 records are unique and remaining are duplicates. When we run the dataflow on same file, dataflow processes 10 records instead of 5 unique records. Which dataflow step can filter these duplicate records and process only unique records?

 

Thanks

Rohit

entry.title: Re: Material Staging for Production order

After encountering an issue where a component was not captured against the order due to an excess quantity already reserved, another reservation number was created for the transfer posting. However, the new reservation could not be created correctly.

Please suggest the solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP SSO successor
entry.content:
In 2027, mainstream maintenance will end for SAP Single Sign-On.

For browser-based applications, you can use any identity provider. This could be SAP Cloud Identity services but also Okta. For SAP GUI desktop clients, SAP Secure Login Service supports single sign-on, including the integration with for example Okta.

entry.title: Re: Event Prioritization in SAP S/4HANA Maintenance Management

entry.title: Re: Change in EHS specification values through Function M...
entry.content:
Hi @ashish25bp 

The BAPI is working just fine... Please check for any warnings or errors you get back from it.

Make sure to call "BAPI_BUS1077_SAVEFROMBUFFER" as well and commit your changes in order to persist your changes.

Hope that helps

Mark

entry.title: Re: solman admin cockpit - schedule import job missing
entry.content:
Hello, 

Specific tabs in the Administration Cockpit can have the display restricted based on the values assigned to the authorization objects SM_CM_AUTH(Field Name CM_FUNCTN) : 

  • CRIT_DISP = Display Critical-Object Configuration in Admin. Cockpit
  • CRIT_EDIT = Change Critical-Object Configuration in Admin. Cockpit
  • CSOL_DISP = Display Cross-System Object Lock Entry in Admin. **bleep**
  • CSOL_EDIT = Change Cross-System Object Lock Entry in Admin. Cockpit
  • CRF_DISP = Display Cross-Reference Check in Admin. Cockpit
  • CRF_EDIT = Change Cross-Reference Check in Admin. Cockpit
  • SCIMP_DISP = Display Scheduled Import Jobs in Admin. Cockpit
  • SEACH_DISP = Perform Search in Admin. Cockpit
  • SYSTM_DISP = Display Landscape Overview in Admin. Cockpit
  • SYSTM_EDIT = Change in Landscape Overview in Admin. Cockpit
  • TRACK_DISP = Perform Transport Analysis in Admin. Cockpit
  • TSKLT_DISP = Display Task Lists in Admin. Cockpit
  • WHIT_DISP = Display Allowlist Objects in Admin. Cockpit
  • WHIT_EDIT = Change Allowlist Objects in Admin. Cockpit

By assigning only specific authorizations to a custom role, you will be able to personalize the users' ability to access each section in the Admin Cockpit, as well as their ability to either display or change the data.

This is also captured in the KBA 2450702 - How to restrict user access in the ChaRM Administration Cockpit - Solution Manager. 

Hope this information helps. 

Best Regards, 
Deepa
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Thank you for your questions! I apologize for the delay in my reply.

This approach provides a temporary solution for users with complex logic in their HANA Calculation Views (graphical views). It allows them to leverage their existing CVs against data in the BW Bridge space of SAP Datasphere with minimal effort when migrating to the cloud.

For Calculation Views with moderate or simple logic, we recommend a greenfield approach: modeling them directly within SAP Datasphere (without using the BW Bridge).

Our team has developed a tool to automate data integration for ABAP Tables, xDSOs, ABAP CDS Views, and SAPI/BAPI/ODP Extractors into SAP Datasphere. This simplifies the data integration process.

Following data integration, we recommend using 3NF principles to create a robust data model in Datasphere. Analytical models for SAC can then be built on top of this solid foundation.

Once the simpler and moderately complex CVs have been addressed, users can adopt the same greenfield approach for complex ones.

At the BTP Partner Summit in Heidelberg, SAP mentioned their development efforts regarding Calculation View onboarding (from HANA Cloud) into SAP Datasphere. Unfortunately, the Datasphere Roadmap currently lacks details on this functionality. This will be very interesting, then this new functionality will close the gap that you have mentioned. It means, that the users have to migrate their CV in HANA Cloud first before they can use the new onboarding function to bring Calculation View (on HANA Cloud) into SAP Datasphere.

The key question remains: will these onboarded Calculation Views be compatible with the existing data model in SAP Datasphere?

I hope, all of your questions are answered 😊

Best regards,
Wanda

entry.title: Re: Implementing Double Click Event Handling with CL_SALV_TABLE_CLASS in OOPS ALV
entry.content:
CALL METHOD is a very old fashioned way of calling methods. Try

cl_salv_table=>factory( EXPORTING list_display = if_salv_c_bool_sap=>false
                        IMPORTING r_salv_table = DATA(lo_object)
                         CHANGING t_table      = lt_vbak ).

and

DATA(lo_event) = lo_object->get_event( ).

 Furthermore, you're using the L prefix for variables that are not local. Since you are using variables defined in the main body of the report within the methods, they are manifestly global.

entry.title: Re: ADSO fields getting empty post data activation
entry.content:
Greetings @MKreitlein

As keys in the converted ADSO I am using the same ones as the extractor (which is a standard CDS View) -> IFIGLACCTLIR.

1. Source Ledger

2. Company Code

3. Fiscal Year

4. Fiscal Year Variant (added automatically when adding Fiscal Year, as it is compounded)

5. Accounting Document

6. Accounting Document Line item

I simply cannot understand why some random fields like 0FI_DBCRIND, 0SEGMENT, 0FISCPER, 0FISCPER3, which are 1:1 mapped from source to integrated layer, get blank POST data activation. Until the inbound table they are fine. Once the data gets activated, they are blank. Even in the change log they appear as blank.

I have no specific logic applied to these fields, such as lookups, end/start/field routines or formulas.

I have tried the following:

- reload the data;

- activate the adso again using RSDG_ADSO_ACTIVATE program

- create the column view again usin RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE

Will SAP support on this issue in case we open a ticket?

Many thanks to anyone who can provide a tips or any idea regarding this matter!

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Modification Rule Where-Used List app.
entry.content:
Hi, 

Did you use DMR in Inspection Plan or Inspection Setup ? 

In help.sap.com is mentioned:  "Dynamic modification rules (DMR) can be referenced in task lists (inspection plans) and in the inspection setup. The where-used list displays the task lists and inspection setup data in which a dynamic modification rule is used."

If you want to see detail of DMR you can use app Display Dynamic Modification Rule.

BR,

Monika

entry.title: Scope item 6GD - How to obtain a complete report with production variances?
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition in an ETO process (scope item 6GD), how can we obtain a report with Revenues, COGS and Variances?

Based on this community question Variances are not shown in the Project reports, but only in these three apps:

  • Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based
  • Order Cost Details - Event-Based
  • Product Profitability with Production Variances

The first two are Production Order specific (and so it is not possible to analyze revenues and COGS), while the last one shows figures only if the journal entry is assigned to a profitability segment (SAP help).

However, when using Project with Revenue the postings are assigned to the WBS Elements and only attributed to the Profitability Segment. So these are the two questions:  

1) Is it correct our understanding that "Product Profitability with Production Variances" only shows figures if the Profitability segment is the true account assignment (as it seems from our tests) ? 

2) Does it mean that for scope item 6GD there is no report with this functionality (i.e. to show revenues, cogs and variance components) ?

Thank you!

Luca

entry.title: 🚀 𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲: 𝗦𝗔𝗣 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻 🚀
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce our first 𝗦𝗔𝗣 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝗻 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁 at our wonderful 𝗦𝗔𝗣 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗮 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲. Under the motto 𝗜𝗻𝗻𝗼𝘃𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗿𝗼𝘂𝗴𝗵 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝗲, we have prepared an inspiring program for you!

✨ 𝗘𝘅𝗽𝗲𝗿𝘁 𝘁𝗮𝗹𝗸𝘀 𝗯𝘆 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗼𝘂𝘁𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗿𝘀:
- Iris Seute (Co-MD of SAP Berlin and COO Labs Berlin)
- Franziska Dobrigkeit (Senior Product Specialist – AI Core)
- Friederike Marby (Product Enablement – BPI SAP Build)
- YI HSUAN (Shelly) Lin (Senior Process Mining Specialist – Signavio)

✨ 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗽𝗮𝗻𝗲𝗹 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝘂𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻:
Topic: 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝘆𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗮 𝗥𝗮𝗽𝗶𝗱𝗹𝘆 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗴𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗱𝘀𝗰𝗮𝗽𝗲

✨ Moderation by the empowering Amanda Chantelle Masuku (Product Specialist – Sustainability Engineering)

📅 𝗝𝗼𝗶𝗻 𝘂𝘀 𝗼𝗻 𝗝𝘂𝗻𝗲 𝟯𝟭, 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟰, 𝗮𝘁 𝟱:𝟬𝟬 𝗣𝗠 at the SAP Data Space and take the opportunity to engage in discussions, network with peers, and get inspired.

👉 𝗥𝗲𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗻𝗼𝘄: https://www.linkedin.com/events/sapwomenintecheventinberlin-inn7197246025374294018/about/

Is the natural language input via Joule? if not, can you share any consideration/reason behind the decision?

entry.title: Re: Event Prioritization in SAP S/4HANA Maintenance Management
entry.content:
Could you please create an incident under PM-FIO-WOC-MN component on ServiceNow and we will have a look into it? It looks like system is unable to derive the combination of plant and notification type, and hence it is defaulting to the default Notification type Y1 which is configured via Target mapping for the app Create Maintenance Request. But that is just my guess.

Niranjan

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Where can you see if the SF app for Microsoft 365/ teams is under maintenance?
entry.content:

Yesterday we had a fixed integration and today we only receive information that the app is not available.

Maybe SAP is working on this right now, maybe it's a different problem, but how can I analyze this?

Best regards
Wiebke

entry.title: Transporting from Dev systems to Quality and Prod systems for SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have been developing plugins, setting up data, and configuring our DM tenant in the dev environment. If I have a requirement to transport the configs and setup to quality and prod systems how can we achieve this? 

I have been through the business accelerator website and DM options as well. We do have the option to individually extract all data like POD config, Production Designs, etc. But I would like to know if there is some centralized tool for the same. Similar things are available in ABAP or OData where we can use TR to transport in between systems. I was wondering if this is possible or not for DM Development. Please refer me to some documentation or a way to achieve this. Any help will be of great value.

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh

SAP Digital Manufacturing @ManoelCosta @MarcelWolf

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ BOM not exploded
entry.content: Hi, if the product display type is synced as "Parent/Child List of (System) List of Configurable Products", but the out-of-the-box attribute "Bom Items" is not assigned to it, there might be something wrong. I would encourage you to raise an SAP Ticket for it to CPQ team.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Modification Rule Where-Used List app.

Hi Monika,

Thanks for the help DMR referenced used in the task list so i need to check this particular DMR where used in the task list . so i just check with this application where-used list but no value showing could you help us how to get the value.

BR,

Ankit

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ BOM not exploded

entry.title: Re: Inquiry Regarding Access to SAP Ariba System for Trai...
entry.content:
Hello,

Welcome!
Further to above details, please refer below link for details on PDE demo environment. You can use it to try many different scenarios. Note that it is available to Partner organizations for free for demo purpose. You may check with relevant person from your organization.
Partners can also subsribe to dedicated Demo environment (called DSAPP or TDD systems) available at cost. If your organization already has it, you can also make use of it.
Hope this helps.

SAP Content Discovery Go-Live for Partners

Thanks, Abhijit

Is it possible to use secondary email address to send emails using Outlook?
I have added the account to outlook using secondary email address however send email fails with error "account not found in outlook session"

entry.title: Re: Showcase your business' commitment to sustainable practices on SAP Business Network
entry.content: Good one @amandalaldin

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA - ODATA API's - is it time for a "Safety Belt" ?
entry.content:
OData actually defines this safety belt, it's called server-driven paging.

If a client requests a large result set, the server can respond with a partial result and a next link, allowing the client to request the next chunk of the result set.

It is up to the server to decide when it's enough data for a single response, and servers can count "base" entities plus expanded entities, and of course can also have next links nested in expanded entities.

AFAIK S/4HANA OData APIs switch to server-driven paging at latest after 5000 response entities.

entry.title: Re: The 1H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Release Highlights
entry.content:
Hi all,

I don't know if it has to do with the release, but I've been advised by a customer that you cannot edit the font and the size of the tokens in the Email Notifications

I've tested in several clients' LMS...

Is that expected behaviour? and why? Or am I missing something?

Many thanks in advance,

Javier

entry.title: BADI to determine Sales Order header data using sales order item in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement where I need to determine some of the Sales Order header standard fields based on line items added by user. As of now we have checked multiple BADI's ( SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD, SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_TAX etc. ) but none of the BADI has both header and Item data and provide Sales Order Header as changing parameter. 

We want to use both Create Sales Order and Manage Sales Order apps as per business requirement.

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2402

Thanks & Regards,

Aman Mittal

@Julio_B  @shaofeng_qing

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3

entry.title: Re: Enabling Support for Existing CAP Projects in SAP Build Code
entry.content:
@KazuhikoTakata 

Thank you for your comment. I might use Joule to generate event handlers or unit tests initially, then modify the code to meet my requirements.

Recently, I conducted extensive validation of Joule on Build Code, and I agree with your observation: coding myself is faster than writing prompts and reviewing the results. Additionally, while watching the webinar below, I was surprised by the volume of a single prompt required to generate a moderate quality of code.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/develop-with-joule-in-sap-build-code/ba-p/13695326

I don't think I'll spend much time refining prompts to generate the exact code I want. Instead, as I mentioned initially, I will use Joule to generate the first version of event handler and unit test code.
